creator: jkois@freebsd.org
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

Hm.  Just checked the snapshots allbsd is providing.

They have exactly the same file there as we have on our FTP mirror under
pub/FreeBSD/snapshots/.  Meaning they are basically acting as a "normal"
FTP mirror in this respect.

So I think the best way to proceed is to remove the "Other Resources"
section on this page completely.

Johann Kois

- -- 
 Johann Kois
 jkois(at)FreeBSD.org
 FreeBSD Documentation Project
 FreeBSD German Documentation Project - https://doc.bsdgroup.de
